title: Darkness Consumes All
description: The shadows are alive—and they hunger.
body:
First (public) fabric mod!

Survival hinges on light in this small (and unforgiving) mod that requires you to always be in some kind of light (more than block light ≤2 (and skylight=0 by day)).

- With checks at your head position to punish crawling or partial hiding. 
- Death messages vanish from chat
- Totems / Armor / Protection / Any kind of invincibility will fail to save you.

Idea by @midvightmirage_ on discord\
Coding by me (@iseal on discord)\
Perfect for mazochists or people who **really** want a challenge.

Check out my other stuff (by clicking on [my profile](https://modrinth.com/user/ISeal)) if you like this
